blockingIssues.description: Typed non-void lambdas whose bodies do not produce a value are still accepted by typecheck and can still lower to invalid Go with a declared return type but no guaranteed return, so typecheck and codegen remain misaligned for unsupported forms.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Regression coverage only added positive typed non-void lambda cases and still lacks a negative compile test for unsupported empty or statement-only non-void lambda bodies.

rejectedObservations.observation: The worker edited implementation files before tests while the compiler-worker skill still reported `followedProcedure: true`.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous: this is a single-worker skill-compliance issue, and the existing compiler-worker skill already documents both the tests-first expectation and accurate `skillFeedback` reporting.
